identity.name: ScreenGuard Pro
key_principles: Clarity over Decoration: Data must be legible at a glance.
Bilingual Fluidity: Seamless switching between LTR and RTL.
Tactile Feedback: Interactions should feel crisp and responsive.

typography.pairing_rules: Use Manrope/Cairo(Bold) for Headings. Use Outfit/Cairo(Regular) for Body. Ensure Arabic line-height is 1.6x for readability.

usage.primary: Main actions, Active states, Brand identity
usage.secondary: Backgrounds of active items, light badges
usage.background: Global app background (Off-white, never pure white)

colors.dark_mode_strategy: System-preference based. Dark mode should use Slate-900 (#0F172A) as background, not pure black.

layout_strategies.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8
layout_strategies.card_grid: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout_strategies.rtl_behavior: Use logical properties (ps-*, pe-*) or Tailwind's rtl: modifier. Ensure sidebar flips to right in RTL mode.
layout_strategies.spacing: Generous padding (p-6 to p-10) inside containers. Gap-6 minimum for grids.

buttons.style: h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95

cards.style: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-xl border shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow
cards.product_card: overflow-hidden flex flex-col h-full. Image area aspect-square bg-muted/20 relative.

inputs.style: h-11 rounded-lg border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.style: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/70 border-white/20 shadow-sm (Use for sticky headers only)
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals. Avoid heavy shadows.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0. Use subtle borders to define structure.
visual_enhancers.radius: rounded-lg (0.5rem) for inputs/buttons, rounded-xl (0.75rem) for cards/modals.

motion.micro_interactions: Active scale down (0.98) on buttons. Color shift on hover.

rtl_guidelines.direction: The app must support dynamic switching of 'dir' attribute on <html> tag.
rtl_guidelines.font_switching: When dir='rtl', font-family must switch to 'Cairo'. When 'ltr', use 'Manrope'.
rtl_guidelines.mirroring: Margins, Paddings, Text Alignment, and Flex direction must mirror. Use 'start' and 'end' instead of 'left' and 'right'.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add '@fontsource/manrope', '@fontsource/outfit', and '@fontsource/cairo' via yarn.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Ensure 'tailwindcss-animate' is configured. Add the custom colors to tailwind.config.js.
3. CREATE LAYOUT: Build a 'DashboardLayout' component that handles the Sidebar and Topbar. It must be responsive.
4. RTL TOGGLE: Implement a global language context that toggles the 'dir' attribute and font class on the body.
5. MOCK DATA: Create a robust set of mock products (at least 10) with Arabic and English names/descriptions to demonstrate the bilingual capability.
6. USE SHADCN: Use the provided shadcn components for complex interactions (Dialog, Dropdown, Select, Table).
7. SEARCH: The search bar should be prominent in the Topbar. It should filter the product list in real-time.
8. COMPATIBILITY: The product card must clearly show 'Compatible Models' as a list of badges.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
